name: Maple-Rum Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak beans in water to cover for 8 hours or overnight.
2. Preheat oven to 300°F.
3. Drain beans and rinse. Add to a heavy kettle with 6 cups fresh water. Bring to a boil, then lower heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Drain beans, reserving cooking water.
5. Place beans in bean pot or ovenproof casserole; mix with sesame oil.
6. Place onion in the center of the pot.
7. In a small bowl, mix maple syrup, rum, salt, dry mustard, and 1/2 cup reserved bean liquid. Pour mixture over beans.
8. Add just enough bean liquid to cover beans. Cover pot and bake for 2 hours.
9. Stir well; add remaining bean liquid if needed. Bake until beans are soft and liquid is nearly absorbed, about 1 1/2 - 2 more hours.
10. Uncover casserole during the last 30 minutes of baking.
Serves: 8 side dish servings or 6 as a main dish.
